description: Catch-all error handling that discards unparseable rows, so the pipeline succeeds while quietly losing data.
body: Failure mode: parsing or validation is wrapped in a broad try/except that drops bad records, so the run is green while a growing fraction of data disappears unnoticed for weeks. Detection signals: input and output counts diverge with no error; a known-bad record produces no log or metric; reconciliation was never set up. Do not swallow record-level errors silently. Safer fallback: route rejected rows to a dead-letter table with the error, emit reject-rate metrics, alert on threshold, and reconcile input vs output+rejected.
